## Summary
<!-- One sentence: what does this PR change and why? -->

## Related sprint / story
<!-- Link to the story ID from docs/01_Product_Definition_Document.docx (e.g. US-03) and the sprint from docs/03_Project_Plan.docx (e.g. Sprint 2). -->

## Type of change
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Tooling / CI / infra

## Acceptance checklist
- [ ] Acceptance criteria from the linked story all pass manually
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated (or a justified note below)
- [ ] `pytest` and `npm test` both pass locally
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `npm run lint` both pass
- [ ] OpenAPI spec (`/docs`) reflects any API changes
- [ ] No secrets committed (checked `.env`, hard-coded keys, logs)
- [ ] Updated relevant section of `docs/` if behaviour or architecture changed

## Notes for reviewer
<!-- Anything they should look at first; trade-offs; follow-ups deferred to a later sprint. -->
